metadata.description: Make Claude Code answer with rich, opinionated HTML artifacts instead of walls of markdown. Companion marketplace to the 'unreasonable effectiveness of HTML' demos.

plugins.name: html-output
plugins.description: Nine skills + one /html command + a UserPromptSubmit hook that auto-routes status reports, PR writeups, design systems, slide decks, flowcharts, research explainers, prototypes, and custom editor UIs into self-contained .html files in ./artifacts/ — then opens them in the browser. Style templates are the 20 demo HTMLs at the root of this repo.
